title: Ionic bonding
summary: 9701 AS — electron transfer, lattice structure, and ionic properties.

simpleExplanation.title: Transfer then attract
simpleExplanation.summary: Metal atoms lose electrons to non-metals. Oppositely charged ions form a strong electrostatic lattice.
steps: Na → Na⁺ + e⁻; Cl + e⁻ → Cl⁻.
Conduct when ions mobile in melt/aqueous.

sections.content: **Ionic bonding** (3.2) follows **3.1 electronegativity**. Link **structure** to **physical properties** in every answer.
